process.commandLine: C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe /d /c "echo [MXC] Policy expectation: network.defaultPolicy=block with firewall enforcement. & echo [MXC] Attempt: HTTP HEAD http://www.msftconnecttest.com/connecttest.txt via curl.exe. & C:\Windows\System32\curl.exe --head --location --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 15 http://www.msftconnecttest.com/connecttest.txt >nul 2>nul && (echo [MXC] RESULT: UNEXPECTED network access succeeded. & exit /b 2) || (echo [MXC] RESULT: network access was blocked as expected. & exit /b 0)"
